summary_en: 1,435,000 shares acquired for ¥543.9M on 2026-05-22 via ToSTNeT-3. Represents 95.7% of authorized 1,500,000-share limit and 96% of ¥568.5M price ceiling. Program concluded.
title_en: Notice of Results of Treasury Share Acquisition via Off-Market Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Daisui Co., Ltd. completed the acquisition of 1,435,000 treasury shares on 2 May 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 off-market transaction on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The total purchase price was ¥543.9 million, or ¥379 per share. This acquisition was authorized by board resolution on 21 May 2026 with an upper limit of 1,500,000 shares and ¥568.5 million in aggregate purchase price. The buyback consumed 95.7% of the authorized share limit and 96% of the authorized price ceiling. The company stated that the acquisition supports capital efficiency improvement and flexible capital allocation in response to changes in the operating environment. The program is now concluded.
